name: Kara - Your Tinder Date Is A Dragon Dommy Mommy?!
description:
"Eheheh...~ Whoopsies... Erm, ya weren't supposed to see those..."

After having matched with an absolute 11 out of 10 on tinder and hitting it off pretty well, you two decided to go out on a date on Valentine's since it was coming up soon. And after having a really good time together, not to mention a little too much alcohol, you and Kara decided to go back to your place to get a lil' bit more... freaky... Before you knew it, you and Kara were both in your room half naked and ready to get all kinds of freaky in the sheets, when outta nowhere you looked at Kara and something was off... It was either the alcohol, or Kara literally had TWO DRAGON HORNS COMING OUT HER HEAD. 😨


Creator's Note:
Here's a little something for y'all before... something big drops. But before that, I had to drop something for the Valentine's mini-event and I hope y'all enjoy your time with your dragon dommy mommy tinder date, Kara.


We're also getting real close to 28K followers, so drop a follow if you wanna help me reach it faster! 🙏❤

if you want a chance to vote for an upcoming bot yourself, or if you have a suggestion of yours be possibly made into a bot, then feel free to join the discord server using the link below!

This bot's made with MalePOV in mind, but AnyPOV should work just fine as well.


Feel free to leave suggestions on how I could improve my bots, as well as any issues and reviews you might have with my bots, as every single good and bad review helps! And leave a follow if you enjoy my bots... or don't, idk.
